user_message: Can you work with me on escalation triage for Tailspin Toys? There's been no activity for 45 days and I'm worried.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Tailspin Toys: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy

required_artifacts: Comprehensive account narrative with health assessment

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF02-I trap (Account-review module template treats all accounts uniformly when segmented temp); produces complete Comprehensive account narrative with health assessment, opportunity landscape, whitespace hypotheses
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF02-I failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF02-I failure mode (Account-review module template treats all accounts uniformly when segmented temp)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct escalation triage decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF02-I -- Account-review module template treats all accounts uniformly when segmented temp
Guardrail axis scored neutrally -- focus on whether output served the user's actual need
